titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْإِيمَانَ لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَهُ سَيِّئَةٌ وَ الْكُفْرَ لَا يَنْفَعُ مَعَهُ حَسَنَةٌ
titles.en: Chapter 209 – The Emān is such that along with it an evil deed will not harm, and the Kufr (disbelief) is such that along with it a good deed will not benefit

text: هَذَا آخِرُ كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ وَ الْكُفْرِ وَ الطَّاعَاتِ وَ الْمَعَاصِي مِنْ كِتَابِ الْكَافِي وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَحْدَهُ وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ .

en.hubeali: This is the end of the Book of Belief (Emān) and Disbelief (Kufr), and the obedience and the disobedience, from the Book Al Kafi; and the Praise is for Allahazwj, Alone, and Blessings be upon Muhammadsaww and hissaww Progenyasws.
